message:
fix(runtime): Handle PyValue.pylist and improve module dispatch

- Add pylist case to PyValue.isTruthy(), isFalsy(), and eql()
- Add pylist case to int_convert error messages
- Register marshal and warnings in import_registry for native dispatch
- Track local zig_runtime imports in imported_modules for proper dispatch

This fixes test_operator, test_pickle, test_marshal, and test_picklevalues
in test_bool, plus resolves pylist compilation errors in binop.

files.patch:
@@ -30,6 +30,7 @@ pub fn pyToInt(value: anytype) PythonError!i64 {
                 .bool => "'bool' object cannot be interpreted as an integer",
                 .none => "'NoneType' object cannot be interpreted as an integer",
                 .list => "'list' object cannot be interpreted as an integer",
+                .pylist => "'list' object cannot be interpreted as an integer",
                 .tuple => "'tuple' object cannot be interpreted as an integer",
                 .complex => "'complex' object cannot be interpreted as an integer",
                 .type_obj => "'type' object cannot be interpreted as an integer",
